description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of two battery sites on Kamomejima Island. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1981-07-14.

name_en: Kitamae Ship Mooring Posts and Their Sites (Kamomejima Vicinity)
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the mooring posts used by kitamae ships and their sites. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1982-07-22, located in the vicinity of Kamomejima Island.
This is a monument (historic site) consisting of a drinking-water well used by kitamae ships. It is a town-designated cultural property of Esashi Town, designated on 1982-07-22.

This is a folk cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Tokachi horse dance (komaodori). It is a town-designated cultural property of Otofuke Town, maintained by the Tokachi Horse Dance Preservation Society.

This is a folk cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Higashishikari lion dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Otofuke Town, maintained by the Higashishikari Lion Dance Preservation Society.

This is a folk cultural property (folk performing art) consisting of the Yabe lion dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Otofuke Town, maintained by the Yabe Lion Dance Preservation Society.

This is a monument (patterned ground) consisting of the Tokachi Bozu, a formation of patterned ground. It is a town-designated cultural property of Otofuke Town, located at Higashiotofuke Higashi 6-sen 41, owned by Otofuke Town.

name_en: Wooden Carved Hanging Tablet of Noborikawa Shrine
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (fine art and crafts) consisting of a wooden carved hanging tablet of Noborikawa Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Yubari City, designated on 1985-05-21, located at Sumihatsu 7, Yubari City.

name_en: Calligraphy in the Hand of Togo Heihachiro
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (fine art and crafts) consisting of a piece of calligraphy in the hand of Togo Heihachiro. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Yubari City, designated on 1985-05-21, located at Sumihatsu 7, Yubari City.

This is a tangible cultural property (fine art and crafts) consisting of a large sake cup made of zelkova wood. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Yubari City, designated on 1985-05-21, located at Sumihatsu 7, Yubari City.

name_en: Statue of a Coal Miner Saving the Nation
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (fine art and crafts) consisting of a statue of a coal miner saving the nation. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Yubari City, designated on 1987-03-09, located at Takamatsu 6, Yubari City.

This is a tangible cultural property (fine art and crafts) consisting of a Monument to Labor. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Yubari City, designated on 1993-03-22, located at Minamishimizusawa 4-chome 48-12, Yubari City (original) and Takamatsu 7, Yubari City (replica).
This is a folk cultural property (folk custom) consisting of the Kitano Shrine lion dance (shishimai). It is a town-designated cultural property of Takasu Town, designated on 1978-12-12.

This is a monument (historic site) consisting of a flood-control (chisui) monument. It is a town-designated cultural property of Takasu Town, designated on 1984-08-30, located on town land near the Mizuho Bridge over the Yonkashuppe River at 13-sen 9-go.

This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Seikatei. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1961-06-07, located at Kita 7-jo Nishi 7-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

name_en: Shinkotoni Tonden Colonist Soldier Company Headquarters
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Shinkotoni tonden colonist soldier company headquarters. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1974-04-20, located at Shinkotoni 8-jo 3-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

name_en: Former Kuroiwa Residence (Former Misumai Wayfarers' Lodge)
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Kuroiwa residence, formerly the Misumai wayfarers' lodge. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1984-03-28, located at Misumai 1-jo 2-chome, Minami-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Saint Nichiren
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a wooden seated statue of Saint Nichiren. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1981-07-21, located at Toashizan Myoshinji Temple, Minami 11-jo Nishi 9-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

name_romaji: Kyū Kotonigawa Ryūiki no Tateana Jūkyo Ato Bunpuzu
name_en: Distribution Map of Pit Dwelling Sites in the Former Kotoni River Basin
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a distribution map of pit dwelling sites in the former Kotoni River basin. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 2004-08-25, located at the Sapporo Buried Cultural Property Center, Minami 22-jo Nishi 13-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Sapporo City N30 Site
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from the Sapporo City N30 site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 2004-08-25, located at the Sapporo Buried Cultural Property Center, Minami 22-jo Nishi 13-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

name_en: Documents of the Sapporo Independent Christian Church
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of documents of the Sapporo Independent Christian Church. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 2016-07-28, located at the Sapporo Independent Christian Church, Odori Nishi 22-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Sapporo Court of Appeals building. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 2018-03-08, located at Odori Nishi 13-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

This is an intangible cultural property consisting of the Okadama lion dance (shishimai). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1974-10-25, based in Okadama, Higashi-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido (address of the holding group).

This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Teine Yamaguchi locust mound. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1978-08-21, located at Teineyamaguchi 324-308, Teine-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

name_romaji: Sapporo-mura / Ōtomo Kametarō Kankei Rekishi Shiryō Oyobi Shiseki
name_en: Historical Materials and Historic Site Relating to Sapporo Village and Otomo Kametaro
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property and historic site consisting of historical materials and a historic site relating to Sapporo village and Otomo Kametaro. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1987-02-20, located at the Sapporo Village Folk Museum, Kita 13-jo Higashi 16-chome, Higashi-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the sanmon (main gate) of Eisenji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Abashiri City, designated on 1979-02-10, located at Minami 6-jo Higashi 2-chome, Abashiri City.

name_en: Votive Tablets of Masuura Inari Shrine
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the ema (votive tablets) of Masuura Inari Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Abashiri City, designated on 1979-02-10, located at Masuura 78, Abashiri City.

This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the ema (votive tablets) of Abashiri Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Abashiri City, designated on 1979-09-10, located at Katsura-cho 2-chome 1, Abashiri City.

This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the columnar joints at Ponmoi. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Abashiri City, designated on 1983-03-05, located at Daimachi 3-chome, Abashiri City.
This is a folk cultural property consisting of the Furano lion dance (shishimai). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Furano City, designated on 1969-02-19.
